title: keteleeria davidiana subsp. evelyniana
intro: Keteleeria davidiana subsp. evelyniana is a coniferous plant, specifically a subspecies of the Chinese fir (Keteleeria davidiana), native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Keteleeria davidiana subsp. evelyniana typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves and needles, which can be used to treat various ailments.
